name: SomeIpGetLastError
title: SomeIpGetLastError
description: This function can be used to check whether the last called function of SOME/IP IL has been successfully executed. The call of this function does not reset the saved error.
In the Event of an error, a detailed error description can be read out using the SomeIpGetLastErrorText function.
return: 0: The last called function was successfully executed
